## Networks:

The following networks are available:

* [Proficiency Model](LanguageSM.dne)

 
* Evidence Models:
 
  - Task A [Reading](ReadingEM.dne)
  
  - Task B [Writing/Reading](ReadingWritingEM.dne)
  
  - Task C [Speaking/Listening/Reading](SpeakingListeningReading.dne)
  
  - Task D [Listening](ListeningEM.dne)
  
 
* Motif -- Proficiency model plus all evidence models. [Motif One each task](LangAss_3.dne), [Motif multiple copies of tasks](LangAss_4.dne)


## See also

* [Intro Nets](../IntroNets)

* [Mini-ACED](../miniACED)

* [Language Test](../Language)
